message:
Strip dead code, add parsePartialJson API, fix partial atoms

- Remove bridge.wasm and 6 unused WASM exports (doc_get_string_ptr/len,
  doc_array_at, doc_obj_key_at/val_at, stream_get_buffer_len)
- Delete compare.zig, validate.zig, stringify.zig (dead code)
- Add parsePartialJson() drop-in for AI SDKs (Vercel-compatible shape)
- Fix partial atom handling: tr→true, fal→false, nul→null, 1.→1
- Extract shared buildDocRoot, getStream, Writer helpers (-177 lines)
- Add 54 new tests for partial atoms, streaming, AI SDK compatibility
- Add AI SDK benchmark (Vercel, OpenCode, TanStack, Anthropic, Claude Code)
- engine.wasm: 166KB (from 167KB)
